/usr/bin/g++ CMakeFiles/spmm_bell_sm_profile.dir/src/main_bell_sm_profile.cu.o -o spmm_bell_sm_profile  /usr/local/cuda-12.5/lib64/libcusparse.so /usr/local/cuda-12.5/lib64/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda-12.5/lib64/libcupti.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
